creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the next item on my TODO list, while I am working on fixing i386 build environment.  Honestly it is not very hard but I was intended to leave it and hoping someone can take the chance to get involved. :-)

We can refer to powerpc builds:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ci/pull/13/
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ci/pull/15/
https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ci/commit/3597440d1de56f5c5cf4148f19db9042b324ca3f#diff-ddb607bdb5f082d44138a107e0ae4f0b

I'll work on this after getting i386 build env fixed.  If there are PRs of tested setup, it would be a great help and I can review/merge and reconfig ci.freebsd.org soon.
